params.name: Shroud of Turin
params.source: Fragment Crafting (15.1%), Lottery Machine (0.81%), Relic Forge (90 Relic RF), Wishing (0.53%)
params.description:
On Nov 10, 34 AD, this shroud became the object of worship for the believers.

After Jesus was nailed to the cross and died, his disciples left him. None but only Joseph had come to collect his body. He wrapped his body in fine linen and placed him in the stone tomb. Days later, Jesus arose from his tomb, leaving behind only the linen shroud. You can make out the face of a person with shoulder-length hair imprinted on this shroud. There are red blood stains around his head. This is known as the  …
